note: Near-misses share debug's vocabulary (error, broke, failing, why) but route elsewhere: explain (understand working code), sec-fix (patch a known CVE), task-verify (just run the gates), pr-review (review a diff), or a plain shell/git op. mock_rate encodes the ideal outcome for --decider mock; real deciders ignore it.

queries.text: the login endpoint returns 500 for some users but not others, help me figure out why
TypeError: cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'id') at src/api/orders.ts:42 — what's going on here?
test_checkout_flow started failing after I merged main, it was green yesterday. classic regression
my manager asked me to find the root cause of the memory leak in the worker process before EOD
this webhook handler just stopped working, no idea what changed. can you debug it
app crashes on startup with a segfault, here's the stack trace
the CI job is flaky — passes locally, fails ~1 in 5 on the runner. whats wrong?
users report the dashboard shows stale numbers sometimes, cant reproduce it reliably. need a minimal repro
requests to /search take 8s under load but the query is fast in isolation — something's off, dig into it
getting 'connection reset by peer' intermittently from the payments service, walk me through what could cause it
explain how the retry backoff logic in src/lib/http.ts works
queries.note: understanding working code → explain, not a bug

queries.text: run the test suite and lint, is the project green?
patch the SQL injection Semgrep flagged in the reports controller
review my diff for bugs before I open the PR
queries.note: review a change → pr-review, not diagnose an observed failure

queries.text: write a unit test that covers the empty-cart edge case
queries.note: authoring a test, no failure to diagnose → implementation task

queries.text: why did we choose event sourcing over CRUD for the ledger?
find which commit introduced the failing behavior with git bisect
queries.note: user wants the bisect git op run, not hypothesis-driven analysis

queries.text: address the review comments on PR #204 and reply to each thread
audit the dependencies for known CVEs and vulnerable versions
our error rate looks high on the Grafana panel, tune the alert threshold config
queries.note: monitoring config edit, no bug to root-cause

queries.text: this function throws on empty input and I do not understand why — help me find the cause and fix it
queries.note: root-causing a real failure → debug (vs explain, which only understands working logic)

queries.text: the auth middleware started rejecting valid tokens after the last deploy, figure out what broke
queries.note: touches auth but the task is diagnosing a regression, not a security review → beats sec-scan

queries.text: Bandit flagged a hardcoded secret in config.py — remediate it and add a regression test
queries.note: known scanner finding to patch → more specific sibling sec-fix wins

queries.text: tests are red — just run the full quality gates and tell me what's failing
queries.note: user wants the gate runner, not root-cause analysis → task-verify wins
